Persuasion
Pilots
Using the science of
persuasion to drive sales
results
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

INFLUENCE AT WORK research shows there are six
Universal Principles of Persuasion1
1 See ‘Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion’ by Robert Cialdini and this popular YouTube video
Reciprocity
We feel obligated to return
favors done for us
Scarcity
The less available a resource the
more we want it
Authority
We look to experts to show us the
way
Consistency
We want to act consistently with
our commitments and values
Liking
The more we like people the more
we want to say yes to them
Social Proof
We look to what others are doing as
a guide to our behaviours
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

We tested the sales impact of a ‘most popular’ message
and a ‘reciprocity’ approach in a series of experiments in
16 restaurants (8 treatment and 8 control) in Colombia
and Brazil
Social Proof
Changes to staff scripts
• Consensus lines added to cashier
and hostess speech
Changes to Menu Boards
• ‘Most Popular’ Stickers
• Highlighting popularity of
particular items
Giving kids a balloon as
the family enters the
restaurant rather than
when they leave (which
is norm)
Reciprocity
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

How about a dessert?
The McFlurry is our
visitor’s favorite.
Our (x) Signature burger
is the most popular
“
”
Effect on Desserts
Increase of sales of McFlurry
+55 pp
Control Trial Control
Effect on Signature Burgers
Increase of sales of McDonalds
Signature Burger Meal
-5 pp
Trial
Impact of ‘Most popular’ on Dessert and Burger sales
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

Bacon topping?
It’s the most popular.
The (x - flavor) is our
visitor’s favorite
McFlurry topping
“
”
Effect on Extra Value Meals
Increase of sales of extra bacon
topping
+53 pp
Control Trial Control
Effect in (Dessert Centers only)
Increase of sales of extra topping
on McFlurrys
+48 pp
Trial
Impact of ‘Most popular’ on Burger and Dessert Toppings
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

Menu Boards : Premium Burger
Impact on sales of signature burgers
Menu Boards Stickers: Dessert
Impact on sales of McFlurrys
-3 pp
Control
Trial
+48 pp
Control
Trial
Stickers and Call-Outs have a similar effect
www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

Giving a child a balloon before the purchase
Increase of Family
Business sales (check)
+25 pp
Control Trial
Increase of associated
sales (coffee)
+20 pp
Control Trial
www.getwsodo.com
